note: Curated REALITY donor-SNI candidates. PUBLIC hostnames only, drawn from large, long-lived, reputable sites and deliberately spread across the brand origins of multiple regions (not concentrated in any single market) so the network's donor handshakes are geographically diverse and not fingerprintable to one locale. The node bootstrap picks ONE at random per node and re-verifies it at runtime (openssl s_client -groups x25519 -tls1_3 must negotiate TLSv1.3, with HTTP/2 where offered) before committing it; correctness is therefore filtered on-node and stale or non-conforming entries simply fail over to the next. No secrets, IPs, or locations live here. License is documented in nodes/dataplane/README.md (pure JSON carries no header).

selection.require: TLSv1.3 negotiated AND X25519 group AND HTTP/2 (h2) ALPN where offered
